name: ceratops_github_repo_nondeterministic_contract
description: Repository checks that require intent judgment, current documentation, paid and free classification, or browser confirmation.

evidence.command: python -m github_contract_engine collect --surface repo --repo OWNER/REPO --local-repo-path PATH --json
notes: Collect a separate code evidence bundle when repository-content quality or workflow-file intent is in scope.

review_result_values.pass: AI-agent review found the intent satisfied and recorded evidence.
review_result_values.fail: AI-agent review found a concrete mismatch.
review_result_values.approved_drift: The mismatch is allowed by the deterministic contract's approved drift profile.
review_result_values.blocked: Review needs unavailable permission, paid functionality, a missing product decision, or browser confirmation.
review_result_values.not_applicable: Repository state or source does not apply.

checks.applies_when: A non-archived repository, especially a public repository, is reviewed.
checks.review_required: Confirm description, topics, homepage, visibility, feature flags, support route, and visible GitHub surfaces are accurate and not misleading.

checks.applies_when: The repository has releases, tags, a protected release process, or public release claims.
checks.review_required: Confirm releases, tags, draft and prerelease state, release-note source, rollback expectations, and user-facing text match the project.

checks.applies_when: The repository is neither archived nor a fork.
checks.review_required: Confirm required checks match real CI, review count is appropriate, bypass and administration exceptions are deliberate, and private-plan gaps are classified.

checks.applies_when: Actions is enabled or workflows are present.
checks.review_required: Confirm Actions policy, workflow protections, token defaults, OIDC posture, SHA pinning, retention, fork approval, and recent default-branch runs fit the repository.

checks.applies_when: Security settings, public repositories, or private repositories with paid-feature responses are reviewed.
checks.review_required: Confirm reporting, paid controls, alerts, configurations, and churn-prone settings are classified correctly and not enabled without explicit approval.

checks.applies_when: Dependabot alerts or open Dependabot pull requests exist.
checks.review_required: Classify queue items as active work, intentionally retained, approved drift, stale, or blocked before merging or closing.

checks.applies_when: Open pull requests, extra branches, tags, releases, security alerts, code-scanning alerts, or process findings are present.
checks.review_required: Classify each item as active, intentionally retained, approved drift, stale, or blocked before removal or repair.

checks.applies_when: Feature availability, paid status, or API behavior matters and local evidence is ambiguous.
checks.review_required: Recheck official GitHub documentation or gh help before deciding drift.
Record the exact standards question answered and do not audit or repair the reference repository.
